update.title: New Update Available!
update.updateAvailable: A tastier version of Plateful is ready for you!

beta.title: Plateful Beta
beta.thankYou: Thanks for being part of this!
beta.description: Your experiences will help us build the best cooking app.

benefits.newFeatures: You get all new features first
benefits.directInput: Your feedback flows directly into development
benefits.helpImprove: You help make Plateful even better

emotionalHook.title: What should I cook today?
emotionalHook.description: That question is history. With Plateful, you always know what's for dinner.

importRecipes.title: All your recipes in one place
importRecipes.description: Import recipes from TikTok, Instagram, websites and more — with just one tap. No more screenshots and lost links.

chatbot.title: Your AI Chef adapts to you
chatbot.description: Just say what you’re craving — the AI Chef creates recipes that match your diet. Quick, creative, and always a fit.

mealPlanning.title: Your weekly plan
mealPlanning.subtitle: flexible, not rigid
mealPlanning.description: Plan as much or as little as you want. Move recipes between days or toss everything into your weekly pool. No pressure, no stress.

testimonial1.quote: No more flipping through cookbooks and scrolling TikTok for hours. We plan our whole week in minutes now!
testimonial1.name: My Girlfriend

testimonial2.quote: Best app I've ever seen! (She says that about everything I build, but we'll take it.)
testimonial2.name: My Mom

testimonial3.quote: Now I finally cook all my TikTok recipes instead of just saving them!
testimonial3.name: Hopefully you soon?

leaveHousehold.description: Are you sure you want to leave this household? You will need an invitation to rejoin.

leaveAsOwner.title: Leave Household
leaveAsOwner.description: You are the owner. Ownership will be automatically transferred to another member. Are you sure?

leaveAsLastMember.title: Leave Household
leaveAsLastMember.description: You are the last member. The household will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

deleteHousehold.title: Delete Household
deleteHousehold.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All recipes, meal plans, and cookbooks will be permanently deleted.

makeOwner.title: Transfer Ownership
